channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump vs. the public's right to know
item.description: The Trump administration's moves to limit public access to government records are prompting warnings from watchdogs and historians. The big picture: A...

item.title: New frontier of AI forces Trump's heavy hand
item.description: President Trump set out on his first day in office to free artificial intelligence from government constraints. 15 months later, his own White House i...

item.title: A slow shift among Black voters is opening the door for Republicans
item.description: A generational and structural shift is decoupling Black identity from Democratic Party loyalty, transforming a once-reliable voting bloc into a cohort...

item.title: What a gas tax holiday would actually do
item.description: The gasoline price surge is reigniting political chatter about suspending the federal tax on the fuel to help consumers, thanks to a recent round of p...
